tickets.subject: Regression in the dashboard widget
tickets.description: There is a regression in the dashboard widget after the last update, expected behavior was to show totals but it now shows zero.

tickets.subject: General feedback about the product
tickets.description: I just wanted to share some general feedback about my overall experience with the product so far.

tickets.subject: Production down for our team
tickets.description: Our production environment is down and nothing loads, this is critical and affecting the whole team.

tickets.subject: Suggestion for billing page
tickets.description: Just a minor suggestion, it would be nice if the billing page showed the next renewal date more clearly.

tickets.subject: Add dark mode please
tickets.description: It would be great if you could add a dark mode option, purely a cosmetic suggestion but many users want it.

tickets.subject: Question about my invoice

tickets.subject: Found a bug in the search filter
tickets.description: I found a bug in the search filter, steps to reproduce: search for any term then apply a filter, the results reset. This is blocking my work.
